title: vilfa cylindrica
intro: Vilfa cylindrica, also known as Indian valerian or sweet-scented valerian, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Vilfa cylindrica include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its use as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Vilfa cylindrica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be taken internally to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
